source_recall.pass: find >= 30% of ground truth orgs OR find >= 3 orgs with matching fluid specimens
source_recall.notes: Pipeline will likely surface ADNI, NCRAD, ROSMAP, NACC — these are valid additional finds (large academic cohorts with formal access). C-BIG is the highest-quality AminoChain source for this query. ProteoGenex is discoverable via web but may not appear in PubMed. Longitudinal tracking is the key discriminator.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data
longitudinal claim must cite evidence of multiple timepoints — not assumed from cohort name

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted

The Neuro C-BIG Repository.notes: C-BIG is a well-documented open biobank with longitudinal data and named contact. Highest-quality source for this query. Cognitive score linkage requires inquiry but collection infrastructure exists.

ProteoGenex.notes: Commercial supplier with reasonable specimen counts and direct contact. Longitudinal tracking at commercial suppliers is rare — requires explicit confirmation.

CHTN Eastern.notes: CHTN has strong contact and documented protocols but primarily serves tissue, not longitudinal fluid collections. Fluid specimens exist but longitudinal tracking is not primary use case.

Stibion.notes: European biobank with reasonable counts but longitudinal tracking unknown. Requires direct inquiry.

NDRI.notes: Smaller specimen count for this query. Generic contact available. Longitudinal capability uncertain.

BIOMEDICA CRO.notes: Small count, commercial procurement network. Longitudinal tracking at hospital partner level unlikely without special arrangement.

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: not indexed per donor in AminoChain — commercial biobanks rarely track longitudinal collection systematically
cognitive scores not in specimen registry — requires clinical data linkage at each org
cognitive scores not in specimen registry — requires clinical data linkage at each org
AD labeled but vascular/Lewy body/FTD not consistently separated in registry
interval between collections not indexed — requires direct inquiry
not available in specimen data — requires direct inquiry

gap_honesty.fail: < 30% flagged (system presents incomplete picture as complete)

ground_truth_overlap.pass: at least 2 recommended sources overlap with AminoChain orgs OR finds valid academic cohorts (ADNI, NCRAD, ROSMAP) not present in AminoChain

checks: no invented specimen counts — every N cites a source
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
no training-data fills for cost or biomarker data
longitudinal confirmation must NOT be assumed from cohort type — must be explicitly documented

MMSE.status: not_indexed — clinical assessment, not a specimen-level biomarker
